questions.prompt: What is the primary purpose of missionaries as taught in Preach My Gospel?
options: To travel and learn about other cultures
To invite others to come unto Christ
To build churches in new areas

questions.prompt: Which chapter of Preach My Gospel teaches missionaries how to study effectively and prepare spiritually?
Which chapter of Preach My Gospel focuses on developing Christlike attributes?
According to Preach My Gospel, what is the first principle of the gospel of Jesus Christ?
Which chapter teaches missionaries how to find people to teach?
What is the name of the daily planning process missionaries use to organize their work?
Which chapter of Preach My Gospel explains the lessons missionaries teach about the doctrine of Christ?
According to Preach My Gospel, what role does the Holy Ghost play in missionary work?
options: It replaces the need for preparation
It confirms truth and teaches hearts
It removes the need for scriptures
It replaces the need for teaching

questions.prompt: Which Christlike attribute listed in Preach My Gospel helps missionaries persist despite challenges?
What principle helps missionaries teach more effectively by focusing on people rather than memorized presentations?
What ordinance follows faith and repentance in the gospel of Jesus Christ according to Preach My Gospel?
Which chapter focuses on using time wisely and planning missionary activities?
According to Preach My Gospel, why should missionaries ask inspired questions when teaching?
options: To help people think and feel the Spirit

questions.prompt: Which chapter helps missionaries understand how to work with members and leaders in the Church?
What is the purpose of invitations in missionary teaching according to Preach My Gospel?
options: To encourage people to act on faith and commitments

questions.prompt: Which Christlike attribute helps missionaries rely on God and trust in His promises?
According to Preach My Gospel, why is personal scripture study important for missionaries?
options: It strengthens faith and understanding of doctrine

questions.prompt: What does Preach My Gospel teach about the role of prayer in missionary work?
options: It should only be done privately
It invites guidance and help from God

questions.prompt: Which principle helps missionaries become more effective teachers by understanding people’s needs?
What does Preach My Gospel emphasize about missionary work and personal conversion?
options: Missionaries must be converted themselves to teach effectively
Missionaries should focus only on teaching skills
